etymology.description: 大 ("big") + 十 ("ten") = combining large size with the concept of ten -> symbolizing a foundation or root
etymology.interpretation: The character 夲 (tuō, "root") combines 大 (dà, "big") and 十 (shí, "ten") to suggest a broad and solid foundation, emphasizing the concept of a base or root. This notion of expansiveness or fundamental support connects to the idea of the root being a central or anchoring point.
